signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Hit $65
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Hit $65.89M in April with 6-Day Streak | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP investment products recorded their strongest month of the year, attracting $65.89 million by mid-April via relentless double-digit daily inflows, reversing March outflows and signaling Wall Street's altcoin rotation amid macro relief.[4]

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Vote Days Away, Boosting Polymarket Odds | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Vote Days Away, Boosting Polymarket Odds | YES | MED confidence**  
The CLARITY Act's markup vote nears (post-April 16 discussions), evaporating XRP's legal risk and shifting prediction market odds bullish, alongside regulatory clarity enhancing institutional appeal.[3][5]

signals.headline: XRP Flips BNB as #4 Crypto at $91B, Eyes Ethereum Parity | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Flips BNB as #4 Crypto at $91B, Eyes Ethereum Parity | NO | LOW confidence**  
XRP surpassed BNB's market cap to rank fourth at $91 billion (from $1.47), narrowing the $189B gap to Ethereum (~$280B) and prompting speculation of $2.50+ parity per Standard Chartered, but no confirmed catch or surpassing yet.[1]

signals.headline: Ethereum Records 41% Transaction Surge to 3
signals.raw:
Ethereum Records 41% Transaction Surge to 3.6M Daily, Outpaces BTC | YES | HIGH confidence**  
ETH posted a record transaction week with daily volumes up 41% to 3.6 million, breaking $2,400 at a 2-month high and validating BTC rotation via bullish signals and flows outpacing Bitcoin for the first time in 2026.[1]

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volumes**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (30% odds on 200-219 tweets, $5M volume) and "Elon Musk musk # tweets in April 2026?" (18% on 1080-1119 tweets, $9M volume, $501K today).[1][2][4]
